data: Interview Preparation - Thank You and Follow-up Communication
Interview Preparation - Thank You and Follow-up Communication
Revise how to write thank you and follow-up messages after interviews

message: Let's revise how to write a thank you and follow-up message after an interview.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"Thank you for the opportunity to interview for [role]. I look forward to [next step]."

This structure helps you end the interview process on a professional and positive note.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a2c5fcb1-718b-4a1f-ae96-490b15f1631e-Interview---Thank-you-follow-up.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a2c5fcb1-718b-4a1f-ae96-490b15f1631e-Interview---Thank-you-follow-up.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct thank you message after an interview

1.Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the logistics executive role. I look forward to your decision.
2.Thanks for your time. Let me know what happens next.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct follow-up message after a finance role interview

1.When will you tell me if I got the job or not?
2.Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the finance analyst role. I look forward to the next steps.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?

'5. You attended a sales executive interview. Write your thank you and follow-up message.'"
